content:
- Executed meta-task 18 pass-7 deep skeptical review with fresh evidence dir `.ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass7-20260304T205520Z`.
- Hardened Makefile gate bypass resistance: reject `TIMEOUT_BIN` when set via environment; refuse `MAKEFLAGS=-e`.
- Removed all `#[allow(dead_code)]` suppressions in `src/test_harness/provenance.rs` and added lightweight policy/attestation metadata validation.
- Fixed contributor-doc drift (etcd harness readiness wording; codebase-map now matches required chapter shape) and updated Node API docs (fallback endpoints; debug/verbose optional since).
- Made verification report reachable in SUMMARY and added historical-scope notice to avoid stale-path misleadingness; deleted obsolete contributor stub.
- Fixed flake in `dcs::etcd_store::tests::etcd_store_disconnect_clears_pending_queue_before_reconnect_snapshot` (allow early Reset marker while still banning stale queued events).
- Ran required gates and archived logs: `make check`, `make test` (after-fix), `make lint`, `make test-long` all pass.
- Created/closed bug tasks from subagents: docs drift + provenance helper compile break.
- Set `.ralph/model.txt` back to `normal_high` and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`.

- Next: stage + commit + push; then stop. No further tasks queued for this pass.
